Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Windfall]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — Windfall is the name of the fortress Lindon and his companions are visiting.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — Most of the open space on Windfall consists of rolling grassland.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — Windfall contains a miniature mountain that serves as an aura source.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — Windfall is a cloud fortress.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — The miniature mountain on Windfall resembles a smoldering volcano.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — The miniature mountain on Windfall has an open cave at its base filled with silvery protrusions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — The air in the cave at the base of the mountain glistens with sword aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Windfall is a location Lindon suggests Yerin stay on.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — Windfall has a blue cloud base.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — Windfall lifts off under Dross' control.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 16''' — Windfall is a cloudship.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Windfall is a big blue cloudship located to the north of Refuge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — Windfall has room for Lindon's family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon is pacing on the edge of Windfall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon stood on the edge of Windfall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — Windfall is a location where Naru Huan arrived.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 6''' — Windfall is a location or vessel Lindon could have used.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon finished construction of a new building on Windfall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Windfall is a ship that can sit on the ground inside city walls.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 8''' — Windfall is the location of Lindon's house.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Windfall is Lindon's home and drifts on a huge blue cloudbase.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — Windfall contains built-in scripts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 8''' — Windfall is a cloud fortress with a deep blue base.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 8''' — Windfall contains a garden of sacred herbs, two trees, a pool of crystalline water, and a three-story house.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 8''' — Windfall is a flying island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — Windfall is a ship or location where Lindon and Dross are.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Windfall is located on the former site of the Wei clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 24''' — Windfall is a vessel Lindon used to fly.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Windfall is a place associated with wind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Time had passed inside Windfall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 11''' — Windfall was left in the path of the Weeping Dragon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Windfall is a pocket world located over the Trackless Sea.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Windfall is a floating island that drifts on dark blue clouds over the ocean.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — Windfall is a location that could be broken by the battle with the Dreadgod.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — Windfall is a location where Lindon has strong authority.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — Windfall is a cloudship owned by Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — Windfall has a large room at the top.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — Windfall is a location where Lindon set up Emriss Silentborn's prison space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 32''' — Lindon stands on the highest level of Windfall.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Windfall is the name chosen for the newborn world.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
